---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a capability
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem first** (whose workflow hurts, when):

**Segment** (USV developer · autonomy vendor · research lab · other):

**Evidence angle** — how does this improve verification evidence (new scenario class, new KPI, better uncertainty, regulatory mapping)? Features with no evidence angle are deprioritized by policy.

**Proposed shape** (optional):

**Willing to design-partner on it?** (yes/no)
